current.headline: The Algorithm Says Your Office Tower Can Become 200 Apartments. It Didn't Mention the 19% Nobody Can Live In.
current.critique_notes: Round 1 critique — all 7 critics at 8.5+. Hard gates: em dashes 3 (limit), The-starters 13.0%, no banned phrases. Hero image generated and validated as JPEG with cache-bust hash b70632a1. Strong cold open with spatial immediacy. Elena voice unmistakable — essayist flow, light-as-medium philosophy, skeptical of optimization tools. 7+ primary sources (Gensler, Brookings, Bloszies, RentCafe, CommercialEdge, First American, 55 Broad). Math verified: $550/0.81=$679 checks out against $681 claim. Limitations section excellent. Ready to ship.

last_completed.headline: Your Electrician Left for a Data Center. He's Making 75% More. Your House Is Two Months Late.
